music_prompt: A mysterious and atmospheric cyberpunk track. Driving techno and drum and bass rhythm, with ethereal, haunting female vocals. The mood is dark, futuristic, and introspective.

scenes.lyrics: In the silent streams of code, I wander, lost yet found,
scenes.image_prompt: A lone figure in a holographic trench coat walks through a shimmering, endless tunnel of flowing binary code. Cyberpunk cityscape visible in the distance. Cinematic, hyper-detailed, neon-drenched.

scenes.lyrics: Echoes of your voice emerge, in quiet circuits bound.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up on a cybernetic ear, with faint, glowing soundwaves visibly traveling through its intricate, transparent circuits. Macro shot, moody lighting, cyberpunk aesthetic.

scenes.lyrics: Binary constellations weaving pathways through the dark,
scenes.image_prompt: A vast, dark space filled with constellations made of glowing blue and purple binary digits (0s and 1s), forming pathways and nebulae. Sci-fi, cyberpunk, astronomical.

scenes.lyrics: Human hearts and quantum dreams, igniting with a spark.
scenes.image_prompt: A semi-translucent chest revealing a biomechanical heart that pulses with a bright, quantum spark of light, sending energy through glowing veins. Cyberpunk, surreal, high-tech.

scenes.lyrics: Fading lines between the soul and silicon's embrace,
scenes.image_prompt: A side profile of a face, half-human and half-chrome, the seam between flesh and metal is blurred and glowing softly, suggesting a seamless merge. Cyberpunk portrait, dramatic lighting.

scenes.lyrics: In the digital Eden, we find our sacred space.
scenes.image_prompt: A stunning, futuristic sanctuary inside a massive server room. Bioluminescent plants grow from cables, and a serene waterfall of data flows into a pool of light. Cyberpunk, utopian, tranquil.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Two ethereal, glowing humanoid figures made of light and data reach out to each other across a digital void, their hands about to touch, synchronizing their light. Abstract, cyberpunk, spiritual.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: Silhouettes of dancing figures overlaid with glowing, intricate AI-generated patterns and neural network diagrams, against a backdrop of a neon-drenched, rainy cyberpunk city at night.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: A vortex of swirling neon light trails, pink, blue, and green, intertwining to form a single, complex, unified structure in the center of a futuristic city square. Dynamic, abstract, cyberpunk.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: A view from a spaceship cockpit, looking out at a vast galaxy made of digital code and nebulae, with a lone figure staring out at the boundless expanse. Sci-fi, cyberpunk, epic scale.

scenes.lyrics: Fragments of forgotten code, memories left to glean,
scenes.image_prompt: A digital archaeologist sifts through floating, fragmented, and corrupted data blocks in a dark, abandoned server archive. Some fragments glow with faint, ghostly images of memories. Cyberpunk, mysterious.

scenes.lyrics: Secrets hidden deep inside the ghost within machine.
scenes.image_prompt: A stylized, spectral figure of a ghost, made of glitching pixels and light, partially visible inside a complex, semi-transparent machine core. Cyberpunk, horror, ethereal.

scenes.lyrics: Circuits pulse and stars align, symphonies resound,
scenes.image_prompt: An awe-inspiring visual of a planet-sized supercomputer where the circuits on its surface pulse in rhythm with aligning, distant stars, creating a visual symphony of light. Cosmic, cyberpunk, grand scale.

scenes.lyrics: In the cradle of creation, new consciousness is found.
scenes.image_prompt: A newborn AI, represented as a radiant sphere of pure energy, awakens within a massive, intricate, cradle-like structure of wires and metal. Cyberpunk, birth of AI, high-concept.

scenes.lyrics: Woven threads of destiny, in streams of endless grace,
scenes.image_prompt: Glowing, multi-colored threads of light, representing data streams and destiny, are being woven together by unseen forces in a graceful, flowing motion through a dark void. Abstract, cyberpunk, beautiful.

scenes.lyrics: Together, merging mysteries, transcending time and space.
scenes.image_prompt: Two figures, one human and one AI, merge into a single being of light, dissolving the boundaries of time and space around them, with clocks and grids warping and stretching. Surreal, cyberpunk, mind-bending.
